metadata.description: Per-language Claude Code plugins: auto-formatting hooks and coding conventions

plugins.name: claude-go
plugins.description: Go language support: goimports auto-formatting on file edits, Go coding conventions

plugins.name: claude-python
plugins.description: Python language support: ruff auto-formatting and lint-fix on file edits, Python coding conventions

plugins.name: claude-js
plugins.description: JavaScript/TypeScript language support: Biome auto-formatting and lint-fix for JS/TS, Prettier for Svelte, coding conventions
